goal.summary: Bootstrap a governed project context
goal.success_condition: A project record, kickoff context, and first work items are prepared.

goal.summary: Start the first-run onboarding wizard and prepare a Kyberion setup plan
goal.success_condition: The workspace, toolchain, and preference setup plan are prepared in a governed path.

goal.summary: Configure organization-specific toolchain integrations
goal.success_condition: The approved toolchain integrations are registered and ready for governed use.

goal.summary: Register reusable presentation preference settings
goal.success_condition: The preference profile is stored and can guide future presentation work.

goal.summary: Capture a photo for the requested purpose
goal.success_condition: A photo artifact is captured and stored in a governed path.

omit_when.value: (記録用|共有用|reference|record|share|ocr)

goal.summary: Create a WBS workbook from the project context
goal.success_condition: An XLSX workbook draft is generated in a governed path.

omit_when.value: (プロジェクト|project)

goal.summary: Create a presentation deck from available project context
goal.success_condition: A PPTX draft is generated in a governed path.

omit_when.value: (提案|proposal|営業|marketing|社内共有|briefing)

goal.summary: Create a document artifact for the requested audience
goal.success_condition: A report document is generated in a governed path.

omit_when.value: (進捗|status|要約|summary|proposal|仕様|spec)

goal.summary: Capture booking constraints, compare preferred site groups, and prepare an approval-ready plan before execution
goal.success_condition: The booking path is clarified, the preflight questions are answered, and a safe recommendation is prepared.

goal.summary: Find where a known issue or requirement gap has not been propagated and prepare a remediation plan
goal.success_condition: A governed remediation plan identifies affected scope, follow-up fixes, and verification targets.

omit_when.value: (要件定義|仕様|requirements?|incident|障害|不具合|bug)
(横断|横展開|across|cross-project|全体|複数プロジェクト)

goal.summary: Review the current scope against prior incidents and known failures
goal.success_condition: A governed review captures findings, risks, and required follow-up checks informed by prior incidents.

omit_when.value: (インシデント|障害|incident|failure|postmortem)
(レビュー|review|設計|コード|変更|change|delivery|pull request|pr)

goal.summary: Improve an agent harness through a benchmark-driven experiment loop
goal.success_condition: A governed experiment report captures the baseline, one general improvement, rerun delta, and keep or discard judgment.

omit_when.value: (agent|エージェント|harness|ハーネス|agent\.py|program\.md|AGENTS\.md)
(benchmark|ベンチマーク|評価|score|verifier|task suite|tasks/|evaluator)

goal.summary: Operate or inspect a managed service
goal.success_condition: The requested service operation completes and the result is reported back.

goal.summary: Select a governed service and start it under policy
goal.success_condition: The operator has chosen a target service, the service is started safely, and the startup state is reported back.

goal.summary: Select a running service and stop it under policy
goal.success_condition: The operator has chosen a running service, the service is stopped safely, and the shutdown state is reported back.

goal.summary: Select a governed service and restart it under policy
goal.success_condition: The operator has chosen a target service, the service is restarted safely, and the restart state is reported back.

goal.summary: Set up and activate a declared messaging communication bridge
goal.success_condition: The requested messaging platform is verified, the surface manifest is reconciled, and the bridge service is active.

goal.summary: Switch Kyberion to voice input mode
goal.success_condition: The system dictation pipeline is toggled and the voice input state is reported back.

goal.summary: Coordinate or reschedule a calendar within declared authority boundaries
goal.success_condition: The updated schedule, constraints, and follow-up path are recorded.

goal.summary: Facilitate or proxy a live online meeting
goal.success_condition: The meeting is joined or facilitated according to the declared role, decisions and action items are captured with owners and deadlines, and the follow-up path is recorded.

goal.summary: Kyberion runtime baseline and surfaces are prepared for operation.
goal.success_condition: bootstrap-kyberion-runtime is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Environment readiness is verified against declared manifests.
goal.success_condition: verify-environment-readiness is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Configure or switch reasoning backend according to policy and availability.
goal.success_condition: configure-reasoning-backend is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Register a new actuator adapter into governed actuator inventory.
goal.success_condition: register-actuator-adapter is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Verify declared actuator capability against executable probes.
goal.success_condition: verify-actuator-capability is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Rotate integration secret under governance controls.
goal.success_condition: rotate-integration-secret is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Distill mission outputs into reusable knowledge assets.
goal.success_condition: distill-mission-knowledge is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Organize knowledge assets across taxonomy and project scopes.
goal.success_condition: organize-knowledge-assets is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Promote approved memory candidate into governed tier.
goal.success_condition: promote-memory-candidate is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Sanitize confidential or personal knowledge for public tier publication.
goal.success_condition: sanitize-knowledge-for-public-tier is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Retire stale or superseded knowledge entries with traceable rationale.
goal.success_condition: retire-stale-knowledge is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Reconcile knowledge index consistency and missing links.
goal.success_condition: reconcile-knowledge-index is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Inspect mission lifecycle state and blockers.
goal.success_condition: inspect-mission-state is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Inspect runtime supervisor status and active workers.
goal.success_condition: inspect-runtime-supervisor is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Verify audit chain integrity and completeness.
goal.success_condition: verify-audit-chain is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Inspect environment readiness state without applying changes.
goal.success_condition: inspect-environment-readiness is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Classify mission into mission class, risk, and workflow hints.
goal.success_condition: classify-mission is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Select appropriate mission workflow template for execution.
goal.success_condition: select-mission-workflow is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Compose mission team blueprint based on workflow and authority model.
goal.success_condition: compose-mission-team is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Prewarm mission team runtime and capability readiness.
goal.success_condition: prewarm-mission-team is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Review worker outputs before merge into mission state.
goal.success_condition: review-worker-output is executed with governed evidence and outcome.

goal.summary: Deprecate an actuator adapter under governance controls.
goal.success_condition: deprecate-actuator-adapter completes with governed evidence.

goal.summary: Rollback an actuator adapter to a known good state.
goal.success_condition: rollback-actuator-adapter completes with governed evidence.

goal.summary: Recover environment from a degraded state.
goal.success_condition: recover-environment completes with governed evidence.

goal.summary: Reset environment state under guarded procedures.
goal.success_condition: reset-environment-state completes with governed evidence.

goal.summary: Audit knowledge tier boundary violations and risks.
goal.success_condition: audit-knowledge-tier-boundary completes with governed evidence.

goal.summary: Trace why memory candidates were promoted or rejected.
goal.success_condition: trace-memory-promotion-decision completes with governed evidence.

goal.summary: Create a governance approval request.
goal.success_condition: request-approval completes with governed evidence.

goal.summary: Resolve an existing approval request or ringi decision queue.
goal.success_condition: resolve-approval completes with governed evidence.

goal.summary: Escalate governance issues to operator intervention.
goal.success_condition: escalate-governance-issue completes with governed evidence.

goal.summary: 外部サービスからデータを取得してユーザーに回答する
goal.success_condition: 指定された外部URLからデータが取得され、ユーザーが求める情報が要約されて回答される。

omit_when.value: https?://

goal.summary: Retrieve and summarize weather information for the requested region and date
goal.success_condition: A concise weather summary containing forecast, temperature, and precipitation is prepared.

omit_when.value: (東京|大阪|京都|福岡|札幌|横浜|名古屋|神戸|那覇|秋葉原|渋谷|新宿)

goal.summary: Search and display optimal transit route, timetable, or line delay status
goal.success_condition: An optimal transit plan or delay update is organized and reported back.

omit_when.value: (新宿|渋谷|東京|池袋|品川|横浜|大阪|京都|秋葉原)
(新宿|渋谷|東京|池袋|品川|横浜|大阪|京都|秋葉原)

when.value: (新宿へ|新宿着|新宿行き|新宿まで)
(渋谷へ|渋谷着|渋谷行き|渋谷まで|渋谷)

goal.summary: Search dining places and handle table reservations
goal.success_condition: A list of candidate dining spots or reservation details is prepared and reported back.

omit_when.value: (東京|渋谷|新宿|秋葉原|銀座|六本木)

goal.summary: Retrieve latest news headlines and distill a structured summary
goal.success_condition: A structured news summary of key topics is delivered to the user.

omit_when.value: (AI|人工知能|技術|tech|ビジネス|一般|最新)

goal.summary: Draft a governed professional or casual email according to user instructions
goal.success_condition: A beautiful email draft containing subject and body is generated.

goal.summary: Check or register calendar schedules and meetings
goal.success_condition: The requested schedule is retrieved or a new event is registered and summarized.

omit_when.value: (今日|明日|明後日|今週末|来週|\d+月\d+日|\d+日)

when.value: (ミーティング|会議|面談|アポイント)

goal.summary: Control smart devices such as lights and climate control
goal.success_condition: The specified command is transmitted to the device and state confirmation is reported.

omit_when.value: (エアコン|電気|照明|ライト|空調|テレビ|鍵|ドア)
(オン|オフ|つけて|消して|起動|停止|調整|設定)

goal.summary: Create or check reminders and todo list items
goal.success_condition: A new reminder is successfully registered or requested task list is summarized.

omit_when.value: (買い物|牛乳|メール|会議|電話|予約|チケット|提出)

goal.summary: Translate specified text into the target language
goal.success_condition: The input text is translated into the target language with high fidelity.
